document_api_meta.title: Get Shop Product Performance Detail
document_api_meta.env_desc: Return performance detailed metrics for a product.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: start_date_ge
request_query_param.desc:
Start date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone.
In the parameter name, "ge" refers to "greater than or equal to" (inclusive)

request_query_param.name: end_date_lt
request_query_param.desc:
End date (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone.
In the parameter name, "lt" refers to "less than" (exclusive)

request_query_param.name: granularity
request_query_param.desc:
Granularity of the data.
Available values: ALL, 1D
Default value: ALL
* ALL: aggregate
* 1D: daily

request_query_param.name: currency
request_query_param.desc:
Currency.
Available values: USD, LOCAL
Default value: LOCAL
* USD: US dollars
* LOCAL: local currency where the shop is located

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^performance
response_param.desc: Overall performance data for the product.

response_param.name: ^^intervals
response_param.desc: Interval data for the requested time range. The time range of each interval is determined by the granularity.

response_param.name: ^^^start_date
response_param.desc: Start date of the interval (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, inclusive.

response_param.name: ^^^end_date
response_param.desc: End date of the interval (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format) in shop registered timezone, exclusive.

response_param.name: ^^^sales
response_param.desc: Sales performance within the interval.

response_param.name: ^^^^gmv
response_param.desc: Gross merchandise value: Total amount paid for orders during the selected period, including canceled and refunded orders.

response_param.name: ^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^^orders
response_param.desc: Total (sum of all) orders for the product.

response_param.name: ^^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: Number of items sold for the product.

response_param.name: ^^^^breakdowns
response_param.desc: Sales breakdowns.

response_param.name: ^^^^^content_type
response_param.desc:
Breakdown type. Possible values:
- VIDEO
- LIVE
- PRODUCT_CARD

response_param.name: ^^^^^sales
response_param.desc: Sales of the corresponding content type.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^gmv
response_param.desc: Gross merchandise value.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: Number of items sold in the corresponding content type.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^avg_customers
response_param.desc: Daily average count of customers.

response_param.name: ^^^traffic
response_param.desc: Traffic performance.

response_param.name: ^^^^breakdowns
response_param.desc: Traffic breakdowns.

response_param.name: ^^^^^traffic
response_param.desc: Traffic performance of the corresponding content type.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^impressions
response_param.desc: Each time a link to your listing appears in the shop tab, it's counted as one impression. Users can tap links to visit your listings page directly.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^page_views
response_param.desc: Total number of product details page views during the selected period, including multiple views from unique users.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^avg_unique_page_views
response_param.desc: Daily average unique views visitors to your product details pages.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^ctr
response_param.desc: The percentage of viewers who clicked on product links after seeing them in the Shop tab. Number of clicks divided by the number of views.

response_param.name: ^^^^^^avg_conversion_rate
response_param.desc: Average percentage of unique page views that result in sales.

response_param.name: ^^^^^content_type
response_param.desc:
Breakdown type. Possible values:
- VIDEO
- LIVE
- PRODUCT_CARD

response_param.name: ^^^cancel_and_refunds
response_param.desc: cancel and refunds data

response_param.name: ^^^^returned
response_param.desc: Returned refers to units that were returned and refunded.

response_param.name: ^^^^canceled
response_param.desc: Canceled refers to units included in orders that were either "Unpaid" or "Awaiting Shipment."

response_param.name: ^^^^refunded
response_param.desc: Refunded refers to units that were refunded but not returned.

response_param.name: ^^^^replacements
response_param.desc: Replacements refers to units that were returned and replaced.

response_param.name: ^^ratings
response_param.desc: ratings within the choosen start_date_ge and end_date_ge

response_param.name: ^^^stars
response_param.desc:
Possible values:
- 1_STAR
- 2_STAR
- 3_STAR
- 4_STAR
- 5_STAR

response_param.name: ^^^count
response_param.desc: Number of reviews in the corresponding rating.

response_param.name: ^^^percentage
response_param.desc: Percentage of the corresponding rating.

response_param.name: ^^top_contents
response_param.desc:
brief report of product related content within the choosen start_date_ge and end_date_ge.
sorted by gmv, only return the top 100.

response_param.name: ^^^type
response_param.desc:
Possible values：
- LIVE
- VIDEO

response_param.name: ^^^contents
response_param.desc: Content details

response_param.name: ^^^^content_id
response_param.desc: LIVE session ID or video ID

response_param.name: ^^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: Number of items sold in the corresponding content.

response_param.name: ^^^^gmv
response_param.desc: Gross merchandise value.

response_param.name: ^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^top_creators
response_param.desc:
brief report of product related creator within the choosen start_date_ge and end_date_ge.
sorted by gmv, only return the top 100.

response_param.name: ^^^creator_open_id
response_param.desc: Creator/s open id, use this open id to identify the unique creator.

response_param.name: ^^^creator_name
response_param.desc: Crator name shown on the profile page

response_param.name: ^^^creator_profile
response_param.desc: The URL to the creator's profile picture.

response_param.name: ^^^gmv
response_param.desc: The GMV created by this creator.

response_param.name: ^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: Number of items sold by this creator.

response_param.name: ^latest_available_date
response_param.desc: Latest date in local timezone where data is ready (ISO 8601 format).

error_code_list.msg: can't find any related data; detail: Product not found. Please make sure the product_id you send belongs to a valid product under the current shop.
invalid request params; detail: start time or end time is invalid.
Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The application will be able to access TikTok shop analytics such as live and video, GMV, orders and content traffic data such as CTR, visitors for a shop and products in shop.
scope_list.auth_info: The application will be able to access your prior and go-forward TikTok Shop sales and traffic data by Shop and product, including but not limited to GMV, Number of orders, units sold, Number of buyers, product listings, product impressions and page views, Number of visitors, and click through rate (CTR), all by content type (video, live and product card).
